With a simple construction and lightweight materials, the MINI comes in punching above its weight class, and still features our self sealing foot vent for comfort TechnicalSpecs: 800 Fill GooseDown | iFlex 20D DWR Nylon | Anti-Snag Zipper Tracks | Specs of MINI-M: Weight 408g| Fits 178cm | Chest girth 160cm | Hip girth 130cm | Footbox girth 92cm |Insulation 800 Fill Power GooseDown| Storage bag and stuff sack included Specs of MINI-Long: Weight 528g| Fits 178cm+ | Chest girth 170cm | Hip girth 148cm | Footbox girth 118cm | Insulation 800 Fill Power GooseDown| Storage bag and stuff sack included Temperature rating: EN Limit +6° C/43° F | EN Comfort +11° C/52° F . As a rule of thumb, the “Limit” rating should be applied for men, and the “Comfort” rating should be applied for women. MINI Sleeping Bag Tell me more… AEGIS MINI is an ultra-light sleeping bag that weighs less than a bottle of water. The hatless mummy type is extremely lightweight while keeping warm. This sleeping bag size M is suitable for people under 175cm of medium size and Long size can basically cover most of the European and American male population (less than height 200cm, weight 220kg ). model: AEGISMAX Wind Hard Dusk 7D Nylon DWR 800FP Ultra Dry Down Pro Ultralight Sleeping Bag
modelEn: AEGISMAX Wind Hard Dusk 7D Nylon DWR 800FP Ultra Dry Down Pro Ultralight Sleeping Bag
description: Feature: Performance mummy cut fits close to the body Performance mummy cut fits close to the body improved thermal efficiency; IFLEX®7D outer shell is durable but light, Skin-friendly and soft as cotton in contact; The down is treated with water-repellent treatment which significantly improves comfort; Lofty 800-fill-power gray duck down provides optimal warmth-to-weight ratio and compressibility; Anatomically shaped cover of the partitioned down channel provides superior down control for long-lasting insulation; Different cut sizes of fabric and lining and three-dimensional sidewalls; 4-chamber hood design maintains even loft around head for consistent warmth; 3D anatomically contoured footbox follows natural foot position for maximum warmth and comfort; Down-filled face gasket with cinch comfortably blocks drafts at the hood opening; Oversize, insulated draft collar blocks the escape of warm air from inside the bag; Draft baffle combined with barrier-free zipper system; 60/40 down filling ratio; Double adjustable headband drawstring; Regular and long of the same series can be spliced; Comes with an ultra-light compression bag and a mesh storage bag.

modelEn: AEGISMAX Wind Hard Tiny Pro 10D 800FP Down Sleeping Bag Quilt
description: TINY PRO is a wearable sleeping bag, It can be used in many occasions: zip it up, it is a regular envelope sleeping bag; It can also be used with an air cushion to isolate the cold ground and air cushion in cold temperatures, Increase warmth and comfort; when fully unfolded, it can be used as a duvet; There is a hidden zipper in the middle of the sleeping bag, the head goes through the zipper, and it naturally falls into a shawl, and the cuffs have buckles to fasten, keeping warmth without affecting activities. Technical Specs: iFlex®10D 500T DWR Nylon Ripstop Fabrics | 800FP Ultra Dry Down | Fill weight:550g | Sleeping bag weight:780g | Total weight:835g | Fits up to186cm | Width girth 135cm | Compression sack weight:55g | Package size:18cm X 30cm. How to use attachment straps： The length and elasticity of our straps designed is for that the ends of the band can be wrapped around the front of the air pad to make an “X” shaped cross and then closed at the back of the air pad. We found that this cross-processed winding method can be better TWILIGHT fixed on the ir pad, without unnecessary displacement of the sleeping bag and inflatable sleeping pad. Features： Secured to your sleep pad, twilight sleeping bag offers the snug warmth of a mummy bag, but with great ability to adjust your warmth as needed. 800-fill-power down pro and a down proof iFlex® shell with durable water repellent finish provide lasting coziness and a super soft feel.
